mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROJECT P JOIN DEPT D ON D.DEPT_CD = P.DEPT_CD

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PROJECT_NO, P.REG_EMP_NO, P.DEPT_CD, P.PROJECT_NM, P.PROJECT_DESC, P.PROJECT_STAT_CD, P.START_DTM, P.END_DTM, P.USE_YN, P.MAIN_IMG_PATH, D.DEPT_NM, E.EMP_NM AS REG_EMP_NM, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY P.PROJECT_NO DESC) AS RN FROM PROJECT P JOIN DEPT D ON D.DEPT_CD = P.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN EMP E ON E.EMP_NO = P.REG_EMP_NO
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{paging.startRow} AND #{paging.endRow}
